title: engraven.config.json
description: Configuration for the Engraven memory system's linters.

projectSlug.description: Substring used to discover the harness's memory directory for this project (defaults to the repo directory name).

vaultDir.description: Repo-relative path to the knowledge vault.

memoryBudget.description: Hard line budget for the router (MEMORY.md). Claude Code auto-loads only the first 200 lines.

topicFileSoftCap.description: Warning threshold for topic-file length; past it, promote deep content to the vault.

requireFrontmatter.description: Frontmatter keys every vault doc must carry.

sessionArchiveDir.description: Vault subdirectory holding session archive entries (exempt from orphan/KB-structure checks).

countFiles.description: Repo-relative files outside the vault whose <!-- count:name --> directives vault-check should verify (and rewrite with --fix), e.g. ["CLAUDE.md", "README.md"].
